title: ballot.* status-change event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.10. Produced by epd2_voting_service.events.ballot_state_payload, shared verbatim by eight distinct event_type builders: build_ballot_created_event (ballot.created), build_ballot_configuration_locked_event (ballot.configuration_locked), build_ballot_scheduled_event (ballot.scheduled), build_ballot_opened_event (ballot.opened), build_ballot_paused_event (ballot.paused), build_ballot_resumed_event (ballot.resumed), build_ballot_closed_event (ballot.closed), build_ballot_cancelled_event (ballot.cancelled) - verified by reading events.py, all eight call the shared private _build_ballot_event helper with the identical payload function and differ only in event_type. configuration_hash is nullable until CT-00-10's freeze sets it.
